headline: Acxiom’s Real ID Powers Brand-Owned Customer Identity
summary: CONWAY, Ark., June 18, 2026--Acxiom®, the connected data and technology foundation for the world’s leading companies, enhances Real ID for connecting data and activation across the brands’ marketing ecosystem.
